name: Black Bean-Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the black beans according to package directions.
2. Cut the peppers in half lengthwise and remove the seeds. Steam the peppers, cut side down, over boiling water for about 8 to 10 minutes, or until nearly tender.
3. Rinse with cold water, drain, and set aside.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute onions until soft and translucent. Add chili powder, cumin, basil, oregano, beans, and vinegar; mix well. Stir in rice, salt, and tomato. Remove from heat.
6. Fill peppers with the bean mixture. Place in a shallow baking dish. Bake, covered, for about 15 minutes, or until peppers are tender. Serve immediately.
Per serving: 233 cal; 13 g prot; 303 mg sod; 30 g carb; 7 g fat; 0mg chol; 34 mg calcium
Source: Vegetarian Gourmet, Winter 93/MM by DEEANNE
